code:
import axios from"axios";const axiosInstance=axios.create({baseURL:"http://localhost:5000"});// THE ADDITION: This function runs automatically before EVERY request
axiosInstance.interceptors.request.use(config=>{// 1. Grab the token we saved during login
const token=localStorage.getItem("token");// 2. If it exists, attach it to the "Authorization" header
if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;},error=>{return Promise.reject(error);});export default axiosInstance;
